diagnoses.name: Acute decompensated heart failure with pulmonary edema
diagnoses.evidence_span: CHIEF COMPLAINT: Acute decompensated heart failure with pulmonary edema

diagnoses.name: Atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries
diagnoses.evidence_span: significant cardiac history including atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries

diagnoses.name: Ischemic cardiomyopathy
diagnoses.evidence_span: significant cardiac history including atherosclerotic heart disease of native coronary arteries and ischemic cardiomyopathy

diagnoses.name: New-onset atrial fibrillation
diagnoses.evidence_span: During the hospital course, the patient experienced new-onset atrial fibrillation

diagnoses.name: Acute posthemorrhagic anemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: Additionally, the pt sustained acute posthemorrhagic anemia during hospitalization

diagnoses.name: Ulcerative colitis
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient has a remote history of ulcerative colitis, now managed via colostomy status

diagnoses.name: Type 2 diabetes mellitus
diagnoses.evidence_span: His metabolic comorbidities include type 2 diabetes mellitus

diagnoses.name: Hyperlipidemia
diagnoses.evidence_span: His metabolic comorbidities include type 2 diabetes mellitus and hyperlipidemia

diagnoses.name: Chronic insomnia
diagnoses.evidence_span: The patient also reports chronic insomnia

diagnoses.name: Acute hypotension
diagnoses.evidence_span: developed acute hypotension requiring vasopressor support

diagnoses.name: Postprocedural complications related to the circulatory system
diagnoses.evidence_span: During the perioperative period, the patient developed postprocedural complications related to the circulatory system

procedures.name: Coronary artery bypass grafting via open approach
procedures.evidence_span: Given his coronary disease burden, he proceeded to coronary artery bypass grafting via open approach

procedures.name: Bypass to three coronary arteries from the aorta using autologous venous tissue
procedures.evidence_span: the patient had bypass to three coronary arteries from the aorta using autologous venous tissue

procedures.name: Bypass to one coronary artery from the left internal mammary artery
procedures.evidence_span: with additional bypass to one coronary artery from the left internal mammary artery

procedures.name: Left saphenous vein harvest via percutaneous endoscopic approach
procedures.evidence_span: The left saphenous vein was harvested via percutaneous endoscopic approach for graft material

procedures.name: Cardiac output monitoring
procedures.evidence_span: The pt underwent cardiac output monitoring with continuous assessment throughout admission

procedures.name: Colostomy
procedures.evidence_span: now managed via colostomy status following previous surgical intervention

medications.name: Insulin
medications.evidence_span: Insulin per CVICU protocol subcutaneously as directed

medications.name: Albuterol
medications.evidence_span: Albuterol and ipratropium nebulizers as needed

medications.name: Ipratropium
medications.evidence_span: Albuterol and ipratropium nebulizers as needed

medications.name: Ondansetron
medications.evidence_span: Ondansetron 4 mg IV as needed for nausea

medications.name: Acetaminophen
medications.evidence_span: Acetaminophen 650 mg PO/PR Q6H as needed

medications.name: Tramadol
medications.evidence_span: Tramadol 50 mg PO as needed for pain

medications.name: Oxycodone
medications.evidence_span: Oxycodone 5-10 mg PO as needed for pain

medications.name: Alprazolam
medications.evidence_span: Alprazolam 0.5 mg PO daily as needed for anxiety

medications.name: Nitroglycerin
medications.evidence_span: He received multiple boluses and infusions including nitroglycerin

medications.name: Potassium chloride
medications.evidence_span: requiring repeated potassium chloride supplementation via multiple routes (oral, intravenous, and phosphate-based)

medications.name: Metoclopramide
medications.evidence_span: Antiemetic coverage was maintained with metoclopramide

chief_complaint: Acute decompensated heart failure with pulmonary edema
